definition.name: eps-jb-algebra
definition.definition: def-eps-jb-algebra (definitions/def-eps-jb-algebra.md). For eps>=0, an eps-JB algebra (order-unit form) is a finite-dim real order-unit space (A,1,<=) with order-unit norm ||.|| and a commutative bilinear product o:AxA->A for which commutativity aob=boa and unit law 1oa=a hold EXACTLY, and for all a,b in A: (JB1) ||aob||<=(1+eps)||a||||b||; (JB2) ||aoa||>=(1-eps)||a||^2; (JB3) aoa >= -eps||a||^2 1 (approximate positivity of squares, an ORDER inequality); (JB4) ||((aoa)ob)oa-(aoa)o(boa)||<=eps||a||^3||b|| (approximate Jordan identity). Order, unit, and norm are EXACT; only the product carries the defect.
